headline: Wells Fargo settles lawsuit alleging hiring, lending discrimination
summary: The $110 million settlement, which was mapped out last fall, requires Wells Fargo to establish a $100 million fund to provide downpayment and closing-cost assistance to eligible borrowers who live in or plan to buy a home in certain low- and moderate-income census tracts.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo settles lawsuit alleging hiring, lending discrimination
raw.summary: The $110 million settlement, which was mapped out last fall, requires Wells Fargo to establish a $100 million fund to provide downpayment and closing-cost assistance to eligible borrowers who live in or plan to buy a home in certain low- and moderate-income census tracts.

headline: UBS Clears Regulatory Hurdle as Fed Ends Archegos Enforcement Action
summary: UBS Group clears a major Archegos-related regulatory hurdle as the Fed ends its 2023 enforcement action tied to Credit Suisse losses.

headline: US home builder sentiment ticks up in May but broad pessimism remains prevalent
summary: U.S. home builder sentiment unexpectedly improved in May, but construction firm attitudes about the housing market remain subdued as the war in Iran stokes inflation pressures that are elevating...

headline: Why a small UK lender has major U.S. credit firms on edge
summary: The continuing fallout from MFS' collapse has heightened fears that problems in complex credit markets pose a broader systemic risk.
